primary_sources.title: Most Claude Code problems are not prompting problems. They are systems-design problems. I wrote a deep dive on Claude Code's architecture, governance, and engineering internals. If you want the practical takeaway: `npx skills add tw93/claude-health`, then run `/health`.

I’ve been running a small weekly newsletter for 5 years. This year I started publishing it in English too. I share things I learn in tech, useful tools, how I use AI in daily work, and bits of life from a Chinese engineer’s perspective. Latest issue: https://weekly.tw93.fun/en/posts/260
